titleStmt.title: SII 36.96: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 96. (A.R. No. 96 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete and the last portion of the inscription could not be traced. Gift of the village of Eyiṉikuḍi, a dēvadāṉa of the temple Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār at Ambar, in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu as kāṇi to Tiruvāykkulamuḍaiyāṉ and his descendants, by the king at the request of Nuḷambarājaṉ. The executive document (uḷvari) was issued over the signatures of the officers of the Revenue department, Puravuvari-nāyagam and Mugaveṭṭi. The current tax demand was reasessed at a reduced rate than the old rate of assessment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrī pukaḻmātu vi[ḷaṅka ja]yamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉṉavari riyaluṟṟuḻitarat tikkaṉaittun tancakkara naṭāt
ti vīrasiṅkāsanattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu ..muṭikoṇṭa coḻapurattuk koyiliṉuḷḷāl
Āṭṭattu veḷi melaimaṇṭapam rājentiracoḻaṉil vāṇātirājaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu ceyyat tiruvāymoḻinta(ru)ruḷiṉapaṭi Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉa
m Inṉāṭṭu Eyiṉikuṭi muṉpu kāṇiāḷarṉilaiṉiṉṟu payireṟṟi Iṟai Iṟuttu vārāmaiyil pāḻāy Antarāyak kācuñ cellātenṟu Ivvūr muṉpu kāṇiuṭaiya kāṇiāḷarait tavirac ceṟakiḻāṉ veḷān tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyāṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattā
rkkuṅ kāṇiyākak kuṭukkappeṟaveṇṭum Eṉṟu nuḷamparājan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvūr Aḷanteṟiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa Ivaṉukku kāṇiyākak kuṭukkaveṉṟu yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ Irupatināl tirumantiraōlai mīṉavaṉ brahma
mārāyaṉ Eḻuttināl pukka ceyyumpaṭippaṭiyum meṟpaṭiyāṉukku vanta tirumukappaṭiyum puravuvarināyakam nāṅkoṟṟaṉum kūttaṉūruṭaiyāṉum karuppūruṭaiyāṉum koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉum mukaveṭṭi veḷūārkiḻavaṉum pūcaṅkuṭai
yāṉum marutaṅkuṭiyāṉum Eḻuttiṭṭu vanta Uḷvarippaṭi yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu ceṟakiḻāṉ veḷāṉ tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyāṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkum Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉa
m Eyiṉikuṭi tiruulakaḷanteṟiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam Irupattaiñce mummāvaraiyiṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ nel Iraṇṭāyirattu nāṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟeṇ kalattiṉāl pattāṟākki nel Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟeṇ kalane Iru
tūṇip patakkiṉāl niccayitta nel Āyirattu Aiññūṟṟaṟu kalane Irutūṇik kuṟuṇi
Digital edition of SII 36.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
